Usage: am serve-http [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --host <HOST>


      --port <PORT>


      --path <PATH>


      --no-auth
          Disable bearer token authentication for this run (for local development)

      --no-tui
          Disable the interactive TUI and run headless

      --allowed-host <HOST>
          Extra Host header to accept (repeatable; also reads HTTP_ALLOWED_HOSTS)

      --takeover
          Forcibly take over the storage root from an already-running server.

          By default, if another Agent Mail server is LIVE and answering `/healthz` on this host:port, startup REFUSES (exit 1) rather than killing the responsive peer. Pass --takeover to SIGTERM/SIGKILL the existing holder and seize the storage root anyway.

  -h, --help
          Print help (see a summary with '-h')
